pull.title: [Kernel] Optimize grouped topk kernel
pull.body:
## Purpose This PR add grouped topk kernel optimized for small expert count (num_experts<=512 for single group, or num_experts<=256 for multi group), which covers DeepSeek (num_experts=256, n_group=8), Kimi-K2.5 (num_experts=384, n_group=1), Nemotron (num_experts=512, n_group=1) etc. For large expert count, fall back to existing `grouped_topk_fused_kernel`. ## Test Plan ``` pytest -s -v tests/kernels/moe/test_grouped_topk.py ``` ## Test Result Unit tests passed. ## Profiling Profiled DeepSeek-R1 model on H200. Main: PR: Main: `grouped_topk_fused_kernel` takes around 7µs. PR: `grouped_topk_fused_small_expert_count_kernel` takes around 4µs. ## Benchmarking * DeepSeek-R1 ``` vllm serve deepseek-ai/DeepSeek-R1-0528 \ --tensor-parallel-size 8 \ --enable-expert-parallel \ --max-num-seqs 16 \ --trust-remote-code \ --no-enable-prefix-caching ``` ``` vllm bench serve \ --model deepseek-ai/DeepSeek-R1-0528 \ --dataset-name sharegpt \ --dataset-path /tmp/ShareGPT_V3_unfiltered_cleaned_split.json \ --sharegpt-output-len 300 \ --max-concurrency 16 \ --num-prompts 1000 \ --num-warmups 50 \ --ignore-eos ``` Main: ``` ============ Serving Benchmark Result ============ Successful requests: 1000 Failed requests: 0 Maximum request concurrency: 16 Benchmark duration (s): 448.09 Total input tokens: 229418 Total generated tokens: 300000 Request throughput (req/s): 2.23 Output token throughput (tok/s): 669.51 Peak output token throughput (tok/s): 720.00 Peak concurrent requests: 32.00 Total token throughput (tok/s): 1181.50 ---------------Time to First Token---------------- Mean TTFT (ms): 265.93 Median TTFT (ms): 274.79 P99 TTFT (ms): 361.33 -----Time per Output Token (excl. 1st token)------ Mean TPOT (ms): 22.93 Median TPOT (ms): 22.99 P99 TPOT (ms): 23.61 ---------------Inter-token Latency---------------- Mean ITL (ms): 22.93 Median ITL (ms): 22.71 P99 ITL (ms): 23.85 ================================================== ``` PR: ``` ============ Serving Benchmark Result ============ Successful requests: 1000 Failed requests: 0 Maximum request concurrency: 16 Benchmark duration (s): 422.53 Total input tokens: 229418 Total generated tokens: 300000 Request throughput (req/s): 2.37 Output token throughput (tok/s): 710.01 Peak output token throughput (tok/s): 768.00 Peak concurrent requests: 32.00 Total token throughput (tok/s): 1252.97 ---------------Time to First Token---------------- Mean TTFT (ms): 253.94 Median TTFT (ms): 259.24 P99 TTFT (ms): 370.67 -----Time per Output Token (excl. 1st token)------ Mean TPOT (ms): 21.61 Median TPOT (ms): 21.60 P99 TPOT (ms): 22.17 ---------------Inter-token Latency---------------- Mean ITL (ms): 21.61 Median ITL (ms): 21.58 P99 ITL (ms): 22.49 ================================================== ``` e2e output token throughput improves 5%. * Kimi-K2.5 ``` vllm serve moonshotai/Kimi-K2.5 \ --tensor-parallel-size 8 \ --enable-expert-parallel \ --mm-encoder-tp-mode data \ --max-num-seqs 16 \ --trust-remote-code \ --no-enable-prefix-caching ``` ``` vllm bench serve \ --model moonshotai/Kimi-K2.5 \ --dataset-name sharegpt \ --dataset-path /tmp/ShareGPT_V3_unfiltered_cleaned_split.json \ --sharegpt-output-len 300 \ --max-concurrency 16 \ --num-prompts 1000 \ --num-warmups 50 \ --ignore-eos ``` Main: ``` ============ Serving Benchmark Result ============ Successful requests: 1000 Failed requests: 0 Maximum request concurrency: 16 Benchmark duration (s): 377.80 Total input tokens: 226657 Total generated tokens: 300000 Request throughput (req/s): 2.65 Output token throughput (tok/s): 794.08 Peak output token throughput (tok/s): 880.00 Peak concurrent requests: 32.00 Total token throughput (tok/s): 1394.03 ---------------Time to First Token---------------- Mean TTFT (ms): 324.19 Median TTFT (ms): 342.32 P99 TTFT (ms): 461.99 -----Time per Output Token (excl. 1st token)------ Mean TPOT (ms): 19.00 Median TPOT (ms): 18.87 P99 TPOT (ms): 20.20 ---------------Inter-token Latency---------------- Mean ITL (ms): 19.00 Median ITL (ms): 18.81 P99 ITL (ms): 19.54 ================================================== ``` PR: ``` ============ Serving Benchmark Result ============ Successful requests: 1000 Failed requests: 0 Maximum request concurrency: 16 Benchmark duration (s): 372.00 Total input tokens: 226657 Total generated tokens: 300000 Request throughput (req/s): 2.69 Output token throughput (tok/s): 806.44 Peak output token throughput (tok/s): 912.00 Peak concurrent requests: 32.00 Total token throughput (tok/s): 1415.73 ---------------Time to First Token---------------- Mean TTFT (ms): 314.71 Median TTFT (ms): 338.58 P99 TTFT (ms): 480.30 -----Time per Output Token (excl. 1st token)------ Mean TPOT (ms): 18.73 Median TPOT (ms): 18.71 P99 TPOT (ms): 19.72 ---------------Inter-token Latency---------------- Mean ITL (ms): 18.73 Median ITL (ms): 18.14 P99 ITL (ms): 19.18 ================================================== ``` e2e output token throughput improves 1%. * Nemotron ``` vllm serve nvidia/NVIDIA-Nemotron-3-Nano-30B-A3B-BF16 \ --tensor-parallel-size 1 \ --max-num-seqs 16 \ --trust-remote-code \ --no-enable-prefix-caching ``` ``` vllm bench serve \ --model nvidia/NVIDIA-Nemotron-3-Nano-30B-A3B-BF16 \ --dataset-name sharegpt \ --dataset-path /tmp/ShareGPT_V3_unfiltered_cleaned_split.json \ --sharegpt-output-len 300 \ --trust-remote-code \ --max-concurrency 16 \ --num-prompts 1000 \ --num-warmups 50 \ --ignore-eos ``` Main: ``` ============ Serving Benchmark Result ============ Successful requests: 1000 Failed requests: 0 Maximum request concurrency: 16 Benchmark duration (s): 225.77 Total input tokens: 236035 Total generated tokens: 300000 Request throughput (req/s): 4.43 Output token throughput (tok/s): 1328.81 Peak output token throughput (tok/s): 1497.00 Peak concurrent requests: 32.00 Total token throughput (tok/s): 2374.30 ---------------Time to First Token---------------- Mean TTFT (ms): 158.18 Median TTFT (ms): 155.26 P99 TTFT (ms): 395.83 -----Time per Output Token (excl. 1st token)------ Mean TPOT (ms): 11.47 Median TPOT (ms): 11.54 P99 TPOT (ms): 11.88 ---------------Inter-token Latency---------------- Mean ITL (ms): 11.47 Median ITL (ms): 11.55 P99 ITL (ms): 12.52 ================================================== ``` PR: ``` ============ Serving Benchmark Result ============ Successful requests: 1000 Failed requests: 0 Maximum request concurrency: 16 Benchmark duration (s): 223.20 Total input tokens: 236035 Total generated tokens: 300000 Request throughput (req/s): 4.48 Output token throughput (tok/s): 1344.11 Peak output token throughput (tok/s): 1552.00 Peak concurrent requests: 32.00 Total token throughput (tok/s): 2401.63 ---------------Time to First Token---------------- Mean TTFT (ms): 151.62 Median TTFT (ms): 153.47 P99 TTFT (ms): 208.79 -----Time per Output Token (excl. 1st token)------ Mean TPOT (ms): 11.36 Median TPOT (ms): 11.44 P99 TPOT (ms): 11.82 ---------------Inter-token Latency---------------- Mean ITL (ms): 11.36 Median ITL (ms): 11.45 P99 ITL (ms): 12.42 ================================================== ``` e2e output token throughput improves 1%. ## Accuracy Testing ``` python3 tests/evals/gsm8k/gsm8k_eval.py ``` * DeepSeek-R1 Main: ``` Results: Accuracy: 0.955 Invalid responses: 0.000 Total latency: 335.625 s Questions per second: 3.930 Total output tokens: 129209 Output tokens per second: 384.980 ``` PR: ``` Results: Accuracy: 0.955 Invalid responses: 0.000 Total latency: 302.540 s Questions per second: 4.360 Total output tokens: 129909 Output tokens per second: 429.395 ``` * Kimi-K2.5 Main: ``` Results: Accuracy: 0.939 Invalid responses: 0.000 Total latency: 270.538 s Questions per second: 4.875 Total output tokens: 130800 Output tokens per second: 483.480 ``` PR: ``` Results: Accuracy: 0.939 Invalid responses: 0.000 Total latency: 264.390 s Questions per second: 4.989 Total output tokens: 130805 Output tokens per second: 494.743 ``` * Nemotron Main: ``` Results: Accuracy: 0.265 Invalid responses: 0.001 Total latency: 321.835 s Questions per second: 4.098 Total output tokens: 289823 Output tokens per second: 900.533 ``` PR: ``` Results: Accuracy: 0.279 Invalid responses: 0.000 Total latency: 285.082 s Questions per second: 4.627 Total output tokens: 289197 Output tokens per second: 1014.436 ``` ---
Essential Elements of an Effective PR Description Checklist - [ ] The purpose of the PR, such as "Fix some issue (link existing issues this PR will resolve)". - [ ] The test plan, such as providing test command. - [ ] The test results, such as pasting the results comparison before and after, or e2e results - [ ] (Optional) The necessary documentation update, such as updating `supported_models.md` and `examples` for a new model. - [ ] (Optional) Release notes update. If your change is user facing, please update the release notes draft in the [Google Doc](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1YyVqrgX4gHTtrstbq8oWUImOyPCKSGnJ7xtTpmXzlRs/edit?tab=t.0).

repo.name: vllm
repo.description: A high-throughput and memory-efficient inference and serving engine for LLMs

files.patch:
@@ -8,6 +8,7 @@
 import pytest
 import torch
 
+import vllm.model_executor.layers.batch_invariant as batch_invariant
 from vllm.config import (
     CompilationConfig,
     VllmConfig,
@@ -27,11 +28,17 @@
 )
 @pytest.mark.parametrize("n_token", [1, 33, 64])
 @pytest.mark.parametrize("n_hidden", [1024, 2048])
-@pytest.mark.parametrize("n_expert", [16])
-@pytest.mark.parametrize("topk", [2])
+@pytest.mark.parametrize(
+    "n_expert,topk,num_expert_group,topk_group",
+    [
+        (16, 2, 8, 2),
+        (128, 2, 8, 2),
+        (256, 8, 8, 4),
+        (384, 8, 1, 1),
+        (512, 22, 1, 1),
+    ],
+)
 @pytest.mark.parametrize("renormalize", [True, False])
-@pytest.mark.parametrize("num_expert_group", [8])
-@pytest.mark.parametrize("topk_group", [2])
 @pytest.mark.parametrize("scoring_func", ["softmax", "sigmoid"])
 @pytest.mark.parametrize("routed_scaling_factor", [1.0, 2.5])
 @pytest.mark.parametrize("input_dtype", [torch.bfloat16, torch.float32])
@@ -42,9 +49,9 @@ def test_grouped_topk(
     n_hidden: int,
     n_expert: int,
     topk: int,
-    renormalize: bool,
     num_expert_group: int,
     topk_group: int,
+    renormalize: bool,
     scoring_func: str,
     routed_scaling_factor: float,
     input_dtype: torch.dtype,
@@ -62,6 +69,7 @@ def test_grouped_topk(
 
     with set_current_vllm_config(vllm_config), monkeypatch.context() as m:
         m.setenv("VLLM_USE_FUSED_MOE_GROUPED_TOPK", "0")
+        m.setattr(batch_invariant, "VLLM_BATCH_INVARIANT", True)
         grouped_topk = GroupedTopk(
             topk=topk,
             renormalize=renormalize,
@@ -89,8 +97,7 @@ def test_grouped_topk(
             e_score_correction_bias=e_score_correction_bias,
         )
 
-        if renormalize:
-            torch.testing.assert_close(
-                baseline_topk_weights, test_topk_weights, atol=2e-2, rtol=0
-            )
+        torch.testing.assert_close(
+            baseline_topk_weights, test_topk_weights, atol=2e-2, rtol=0
+        )
         torch.testing.assert_close(baseline_topk_ids, test_topk_ids, atol=0, rtol=0)
